senses.gloss: to watch, to guard, to protect
verbal noun of خَفَرَ (ḵafara, “to watch, to protect”) (form I): watching, guarding
verbal noun of خَفَر (ḵafar, “to be shy”) (form I): shyness, timidity

etymology.text:
From Proto-Semitic *ḫapar-. Compare Biblical Hebrew חָפַר (ḥɔp̄ar, “to survey, to spy out”).

From Proto-Semitic *ḫapar-. Compare Biblical Hebrew חָפֵר (ḥɔp̄er, “to be ashamed”).
